title: ZXBrick Controls
description: Understand the control rhythm and input expectations for ZXBrick sessions, including touch timing, paddle movement precision, launch consistency, and session pause behavior.
summary: Stable input patterns are the fastest path to better level consistency in ZXBrick.
sourceNotes: Controls details are intentionally high-level until platform input metadata is verified from gameplay telemetry.
Exact key mappings and any alternative control modes are to verify before publishing fixed mappings.

sections.heading: Input rhythm
paragraphs: Settle into a consistent input pace before accelerating gameplay tempo.
Small, deliberate inputs reduce over-correction and help stabilize run outcomes.

sections.heading: Session preflight
paragraphs: Before each run, confirm control layout and game settings.
Use a short warm-up run when control feel changes between sessions.
bullets: Review sensitivity and preferred input mode
Start with simpler angles and shorter runs
Avoid changing multiple control-related settings at once
